name: Omar Hamed Yousef
title: Creative Designer & AI Specialist
bio:
Highly experienced Creative Designer with over 8 years of professional experience in graphic design, visual communication, branding, and creative concept development. Throughout my career, I have worked with advertising agencies as well as companies managing their own products and services, delivering impactful visual solutions across various industries.

Over the last two years, I have collaborated with clients across the Middle East and international markets, including the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Jordan, Oman, and several European countries. During this period, I have been heavily involved in medical events, producing a wide range of creative assets including event branding, marketing materials, print designs, presentations, social media content, and promotional videos.

My expertise covers visual design, creative strategy, social media content creation, and digital marketing support. I have successfully managed more than 10 social media accounts, handling creative direction, advertising campaigns, content design, and brand consistency.

In addition to traditional design, I have specialized in Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies, particularly in creating highly realistic and professional AI-generated images and videos.
